australian_relation: ABC Tasmania interview with the Glamorgan Spring Bay Historical Society treasurer describing an east-coast Tasmania house ghost story at a named, verified place.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC transcript names Piermont in the Alice Maria King ghost story; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Piermont Retreat and Restaurant result.
evidence_summary: ABC Tasmania's interview with Noel Stanley of the Glamorgan Spring Bay Historical Society says Piermont was home to a story in which a little girl repeatedly went upstairs to play with a family and then asked for a doctor on the anniversary of Alice Maria King's death. Stanley links the Piermont stairs to Alice Maria King, who died after falling while running for a letter from her fiance, and says this would fit the bill for unrequited love and a ghost to wander around.
publication_or_organisation: The haunted historic houses of Tasmania's east coast; ABC Hobart / Glamorgan Spring Bay Historical Society
